chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Requires Full Blood Money and Half Blood Money in Cases Other Than the Taking of a Life

text: 5276 - فِي رِوَايَةِ اَلسَّكُونِيِّ أَنَّ أَمِيرَ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: "فِي ذَكَرِ اَلصَّبِيِّ اَلدِّيَةُ وَ فِي ذَكَرِ اَلْعِنِّينِ اَلدِّيَةُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.5276 - In the narration of Al-Sakooni, it is reported that Commander of the Faithful (as) said: "For the male child's private part, there is full blood money (diyyah), and for the impotent man's private part, there is also full blood money (diyyah)."
